title: Block Domain - Proofpoint Threat Response
content:
This playbook blocks domains using Proofpoint Threat Response.
The playbook checks whether the Proofpoint Threat Response integration is enabled, whether the Domain input has been provided and if so, blocks the domain.

Cortex XSOAR/XSIAM SOAR playbook from the Cortex XSOAR pack (ProofpointThreatResponse, xsoar-supported).

Inputs — Domain: The Domain to block.; DomainBlackListID: The ID of the block list to block the domain in.; Expiration: The UTC expiration date and time of the suspicious object, for example: 2020-01-25T09:00:00Z..

Integrations/scripts used: proofpoint-tr-block-domain.
